sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_153465_discovert_tasker_form_views"> <x_153465_discovert_tasker_form_views action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_created_by>rjoy</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2022-06-20 16:13:10</sys_created_on> <sys_id>f2de3248db5415101e1792c5d496190a</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>rjoy</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2022-06-20 16:13:10</sys_updated_on> <u_active>true</u_active> <u_description>Change to Advance Task view at any time</u_description> <u_display_name>Advanced Task</u_display_name> <u_form_filter>u_servicenow_form_view='sp'</u_form_filter> <u_order>100</u_order> <u_servicenow_form_view>sp</u_servicenow_form_view> <u_tasker_type/> <u_view_type>advanced_view</u_view_type> </x_153465_discovert_tasker_form_views> </record_update>
